Interface MacUsbDevice.RegistryEntry

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
Enclosing class:
MacUsbDevice
public static interface MacUsbDevice.RegistryEntry extends AutoCloseable
A backend-neutral view of an IOKit registry entry, letting the shared walk in MacUsbDevice run against either the JNA or FFM IOKit bindings. Each backend adapts its native registry-entry wrapper to this interface.

    Method

    String
    getStringProperty(String key)
     
    String[]
    lookupControllerVidPid()
    Resolves this (controller) entry's vendor and product IDs by cross-referencing its locationID against the matching PCI device, encapsulating the backend-specific CoreFoundation dictionary matching.
    void
    release()
    Releases the underlying native entry.

  • Method Details

    • getRegistryEntryID

      long getRegistryEntryID()
      Returns:
      the entry's globally-unique registry ID

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns:
      the entry's name, or null

    • getStringProperty

      String getStringProperty(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the property key
      Returns:
      the string-valued property, or null if absent

    • getLongProperty

      Long getLongProperty(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the property key
      Returns:
      the long-valued property, or null if absent

    • getParentEntry

      MacUsbDevice.RegistryEntry getParentEntry(String plane)
      Parameters:
      plane - the registry plane to search
      Returns:
      the parent entry in the given plane, or null if none

    • getChildIterator

      MacUsbDevice.RegistryIterator getChildIterator(String plane)
      Parameters:
      plane - the registry plane to iterate
      Returns:
      an iterator over child entries in the given plane, or null if none

    • lookupControllerVidPid

      String[] lookupControllerVidPid()
      Resolves this (controller) entry's vendor and product IDs by cross-referencing its locationID against the matching PCI device, encapsulating the backend-specific CoreFoundation dictionary matching.
      Returns:
      a two-element array {vendorId, productId}; either element may be null if not found

    • release

      void release()
      Releases the underlying native entry.

    • close

      default void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
